---
title: '[WIP]Uniswap vs. CEXs'
description: ''
date: '2023-07-01'
categories: [analysis, crypto]
image: 'preview.png'
---

In this post, I will compare crypto trading activities on Uniswap to those on Centralized Exchanges (CEXs). But first, let's have a quick lookback on some of key events in crypto exchange history.

On Jan 3, 2009, Satoshi Nakamoto mined the first block of Bitcoin.

One year later, on Mar 17, 2010, Bitcoinmarket.com, the first crypto exchange went live. [link](https://www.cryptohopper.com/blog/what-was-the-first-crypto-exchange-449)

Four months later, on Jul 18, 2010, mtgox.com, the famous defunct exchange, launched. By Apr 2013, and into early 2014, it became the largest Bitcoin exchange, handling over 70% of total Bitcoin trades. On Feb 28, 2014, after a series of major security breaches, and bitcoin stolens, the exchange filed for bankruptcy. [link](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mt._Gox)

Meanwhile, in Jun 2012, Brian Amstrong founded Coinbase, the current largest CEX in the US. [link](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Coinbase)

Five years after the launch of Coinbase, on Jul 14, 2017, Changpeng Zhao founded Binance, the current largest CEX in the world. [link](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Binance)

Over a year later, on Nov 2, 2018, Hayden Adams founded Uniswap, the first, and also the current largest DEX in the world. [link](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uniswap)

It's been 14 years since the Bitcoin's genesis block mined, 13 years since the first CEX founded, and almost 4 years since the first DEX founded. With 8 years lesser of operation, how has DEX performed vs. CEX? And with 1 years, and 6 years lesser of operation, how has Uniswap performed vs. Binance, and Coinbase? Let's find out!

# DEX vs. CEX

## Trades

*In this section, to compare DEX to CEX, let's look at DEX to CEX spot volume, which is monthly decentralized exchange volume divided by centralized exchange volume (as a percentage).*

In just 4 months, DEX to CEX spot volume skyrocketed to 16% in Sep 2020 from 0.56% in May 2020. Sixteen months later, it made a higher high to 17% in Jan 2022. *To see this on the chart below, click zoom all at the bottom right corner.*

And recently, in May 2023, it made all time high at 22%. That marked DEX spot volume surpassed a fifth of that on CEX.

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/decentralized-finance/dex-non-custodial/dex-to-cex-spot-trade-volume/embed" title="DEX to CEX Spot Trade Volume (%)"></iframe>

*source in case of embeded error [link](https://www.theblockcrypto.com/data/decentralized-finance/dex-non-custodial/dex-to-cex-spot-trade-volume)*

In absolute $, spot volume of DEX and CEX's all time high were $213b and $4.25t, both recorded in May 2021, which translates to 9% of DEX to CEX spot volume.

Last 12 months, though both spot volume on DEX and CEX have generally been down, DEX to CEX spot volume (as seen above) has been up, which indicates a slower drop in DEX spot volume.

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/decentralized-finance/dex-non-custodial/dex-volume-monthly/embed" title="DEX Volume"></iframe>

*source in case of embeded error [link](https://www.theblockcrypto.com/data/decentralized-finance/dex-non-custodial/dex-volume-monthly)*

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/crypto-markets/spot/cryptocurrency-exchange-volume-monthly/embed" title="Cryptocurrency Monthly Exchange Volume"></iframe>

*source in case of embeded error [link](https://www.theblockcrypto.com/data/crypto-markets/spot/cryptocurrency-exchange-volume-monthly)*

Dominances of Uniswap - the largest DEX, and Binance - the largest CEX, in their own market are quite similar (40%-60% market share).

Overall, market share of Binance has been in a steeper upward slope than that of Uniswap. *To see this on the charts below, click zoom all at the bottom right corner.*

Last 12 months, market shares of top 2-5 CEXs are more evenly distributed than those of top 2-5 DEXs.

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/decentralized-finance/dex-non-custodial/share-of-dex-volume-monthly/embed" title="Share of DEX Volume"></iframe>

*source in case of embeded error [link](https://www.theblockcrypto.com/data/decentralized-finance/dex-non-custodial/share-of-dex-volume-monthly)*

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/crypto-markets/spot/the-block-legitimate-index-market-share/embed" title="Monthly Exchange Volume Market Share"></iframe>

*source in case of embeded error [link](https://www.theblockcrypto.com/data/crypto-markets/spot/the-block-legitimate-index-market-share)*

## Liquidity

*In this section, to compare DEX to CEX, let's look at total asset deposited in DEX (i.e. TVL, value locked), and in CEX (i.e. [proof of reserves](https://www.coingecko.com/learn/what-is-proof-of-reserves-por)).*

In Defi, in term of value locked by category, DEX is the largest one. And lending follows closely behind.

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/decentralized-finance/total-value-locked-tvl/total-value-locked-by-category/embed" title="Value Locked by Category"></iframe>

Uniswap is the largest DEX in spot volume, and also the largest DEX in value locked. *Note that the chart below shows different versions of Uniswap separately, which is why Curve is at the top of the chart.*

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/decentralized-finance/total-value-locked-tvl/total-value-locked-in-dexs/embed" title="Value Locked in DEXs"></iframe>

<!-- prepare for plotly charts -->

```{python}
import requests
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objs as go
import plotly.io as pio
from datetime import datetime

# set plotly default theme
pio.templates.default = 'plotly_white'
```

<!-- get CEX proof of reserves -->

```{python}
r = requests.get('https://app.geckoterminal.com/api/p1/exchanges?')
```

Coingecko tracks proof of reserves (POR) of 20 CEXs. Binance has the largest POR, more than 6 times higher than OKX, at no.2.

With $65B POR, total asset of Binance is roughly 17 times higher than that of Uniswap.

```{python}
data = r.json().get('data')
exchanges = [item['attributes'] for item in data]
df = pd.DataFrame(exchanges)
last_update = df['last_updated_at'].max()
last_update = datetime.strptime(last_update, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%fZ')
last_update = last_update.strftime('%b %d, %Y')
df['total_assets_in_usd'] = pd.to_numeric(df['total_assets_in_usd'])
fig = px.bar(
    df, x='name', y='total_assets_in_usd',
    title=f'Proof of Reserves by Cryptocurrency Exchanges, last updated on {last_update}'
)
fig.update_layout(xaxis_title='CEX', yaxis_title='Total Asset in USD')
fig.show()
```
*source: [geckoterminal.com](https://www.geckoterminal.com/proof_of_reserves/exchanges)*

# Uniswap vs. Binance, Coinbase, and OKX

*In this section, depends on data availability, I will compare Uniswap to at least 1 CEX from the 3 largest ones: Binance, Coinbase, and OKX.*

## Trades

*In this section, *

## Total Volume

### Monthly Volume

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2658402/4419143" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/crypto-markets/spot/cryptocurrency-exchange-volume-monthly/embed" title="Cryptocurrency Monthly Exchange Volume"></iframe>

### Daily Volume

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2662647/4425604" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/crypto-markets/spot/total-exchange-volume-daily/embed" title="Daily Exchange Volume (7DMA)"></iframe>

## ETH & BTC Volume

### Monthly Volume

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2662727/4425691" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/crypto-markets/spot/the-block-legitimate-volume-index-eth-only/embed" title="Ether Spot Trading Volume (in terms of ETH)"></iframe>

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2662733/4425703" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/crypto-markets/spot/the-block-legitimate-volume-index-btc-only/embed" title="Bitcoin Spot Trading Volume (in terms of BTC)"></iframe>

### Daily Volume

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2662673/4425617" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/crypto-markets/spot/btc-and-eth-total-exchange-volume-7dma/embed" title="BTC and ETH Total Exchange Volume (7DMA)"></iframe>

# Liquidity
